full_description: FocusFlow is a productivity app designed to help you stay focused and increase your efficiency. It utilizes the Pomodoro technique, which involves working in concentrated 25-minute increments, followed by a 5-minute break. With FocusFlow, you can customize your work sessions and breaks to fit your unique needs and work style. The app allows you to set the length of your work sessions and breaks, as well as the number of sessions you want to complete before taking a longer break. This customizable approach enables you to stay on track and maintain your productivity throughout the day. Whether you're working on a project, studying for an exam, or simply need to stay focused, FocusFlow is the perfect tool to help you achieve your goals.
